Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases that previously experienced a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR compared to the time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases where the prior approval path included a pre-approver versus cases where it did not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful variants (ending in Payment Handled) versus rejected variants involving PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that skip the budget owner approval step
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER does not occur

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR after a re-submission following Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time from first submission to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases with at least one rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR after Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR when preceded by Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER versus when preceded by Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that proceed directly from employee submission without intermediate approvals
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'", 'end': "activity == 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'", 'aggregation': 'minimum', 'filter': "activity != 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity != 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity != 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'"}"
